register.title: Admin registration
register.name: Name
register.nameError: Name must be at least 2 characters long.

passwordHint.3: Contain at least one special character.

register.disclaimer: By registering your first Admin user you are accepting the <link>terms and policy</link>.

login.title: Login to your account
login.couldntLogInDescription: An error occurred while validating your credentials.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.back: Never mind, <link>take me back</link> to the sign in screen.

searchModal.body: Press Enter to open the selected result.
searchModal.footer: Use Arrow Up and Arrow Down to navigate results..

usersSection.sectionDescription: Manage user accounts, and roles with ease.

modalDelete.title: Are you sure?
modalDelete.confirmationText: Do you really want to delete this user? What you've done cannot be undone.

preferencesSection.safetyDescription: Customize your user accounts access and data security.
preferencesSection.thirdPartyDescription: Customize your third party integrations and data sources.

fields.unsplash: Allow Unsplash as a source for images

preferencesSection.unsplashNote: You need to create an Unsplash account and add your API key in the environment variables to use this feature.
preferencesSection.unsplashLinkText: Go to <link>Unsplash developer page</link> to create an account and get your API key.
preferencesSection.storageDescription: Customize your storage options for images and files.
preferencesSection.storageNote: You need to create an S3 bucket and add your credentials in the enviroment variables to use this feature.

homePage.createBoardLink: Go to your boards and create one.
homePage.createNoteLink: Go to your notes and create one.

boardsPage.emptyBoardDescription: You can create a new board
boardsPage.emptyNoteDescription: You can create a new note

deleteModal.title: Are you sure?
deleteModal.description: Do you really want to remove this board? What you've done cannot be undone.

profilePage.alertTitle: You are impersonating this profile as an admin.

profileSection.title: Profile Information
profileSection.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profileSection.namePlaceholder: Enter your nickname, name or fullname
profileSection.nameError: Name must be at least 2 characters long.
profileSection.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email for password recovery

passwordSection.title: Update Password
passwordSection.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

backupSection.title: Backup
backupSection.description: Save or export all your data in a JSON file. Depending on your data, it may take a while. Please don't refresh this page until the save file dialog appears.

dangerZoneSection.title: Danger Zone
dangerZoneSection.description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.

terms.title: User Registration Terms and Conditions
terms.introductionText: By registering for an account on our platform, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before proceeding with your registration.
terms.accountText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.usageText: You agree to use our platform for lawful purposes only. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:

usageList.fraud: Engaging in any form of fraud or malicious activity.
usageList.lawViolation: Violating any local, state, or international laws.

terms.licenseText: This platform is licensed under the <link>Apache 2.0 License</link>. You may use, modify, and share the platform in compliance with the terms of this license.
terms.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages resulting from your use of this platform. This includes, but is not limited to, data loss, service interruptions, or unauthorized access to your account.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to terminate your account at our sole discretion if you violate these terms and conditions.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. Any changes will be communicated to you and will take effect immediately upon posting.
